---
title: "In-Class Exercise 2"
author: "CHUA Wee Tian"
date: "April 25, 2026"
date-modified: "last-modified"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
---

[Exercise 2](https://public.tableau.com/app/profile/wee.tian.chua/viz/Book1_17771005653500/Dashboard1?publish=yes)
